title: AI Agentic Portfolio
description: A production-ready portfolio powered by Claude + Jira MCP, featuring an AI chat assistant (Ask Steve) built with OpenRouter.

title: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
description: Scalable dashboard with live data streams, custom charting, and role-based access built on Next.js and WebSockets.

title: E-commerce Platform
description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with cart, payments via Stripe, inventory management and admin panel.

description: CI/CD pipeline automation tool that reduced deployment time by 60% using GitHub Actions and Docker.

title: Mobile Fitness Tracker
description: Cross-platform React Native app with workout logging, progress charts, and social sharing.
